label: visitor-intelligence closeout
topWin: The website now has a real visitor-intelligence layer instead of just a status surface, and the supporting startup/header/deploy tooling was closed in the same pass.
topGap: Clean browser verification of the new pathway layer still did not complete in this environment, so the next session should start by turning the static/runtime wiring into a confirmed browser pass.
ignisNote: The biggest leverage came from turning audit ideas into a real visitor-intelligence layer, but the next loop should eliminate the remaining browser-verification ambiguity instead of treating static wiring as enough.
